summary_en: ¥50 per share for FY3/26 (ordinary ¥45 + commemorative ¥5). Total ¥81M. Record date 2026-03-31, effective 2026-06-29. 80th anniversary special dividend.
title_en: Notice Regarding FY3/26 Dividend Forecast (Implementation of 80th Anniversary Commemorative Dividend)
translation_en_brief: Chubu Suisan announced on 15 May 2026 that its Board of Directors resolved to pay a commemorative dividend in recognition of the company's 80th anniversary, which occurred in February 2026. The final dividend for fiscal year ending 31 March 2026 will be ¥50 per share, comprising an ordinary dividend of ¥45 and a special 80th anniversary commemorative dividend of ¥5. The total dividend amount is ¥81 million. The record date is 31 March 2026 and the dividend becomes effective on 29 June 2026. The resolution is subject to approval by shareholders at the 83rd Annual General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for June 2026.
